lex.botversion.botversionlocalespecifica: Specifies the locale that Amazon Lex adds to this version. You can choose the Draft version or any other previously published version for each locale. When you specify a source version, the locale data is copied from the source version to the new version.

lex.botversion.botversionlocalespecifica.Description: The version of a bot used for a bot locale.
The identifier of the locale to add to the version.
